goal: Document commit-field semantics in LOG_SCHEMA after observing draft/consume-on-different-commits behavior
done: Added clarifying note to docs/LOG_SCHEMA.md explaining that auto-filled commit refers to the consuming push, not the introducing push, and pointing users to related[] for unambiguous attribution
notes: Surfaced during install verification when commit field on install entry showed fb65829 (consuming push) rather than 8321a03 (draft-introducing push) due to draft-only commit being filtered by paths-ignore on its first attempt
